//: Token-enforcement lint (docs/styling-conventions.md). Design values may only come from --cr-* tokens: typography via text roles, stacking via the layer scale, motion via the motion tokens. The token sources themselves (design-tokens/css, typography.css) are exempt via overrides. Deliberate one-offs (the three art-directed heroes, icon glyph sizes) carry inline stylelint-disable comments naming their case-study rationale.

overrides.//: The new --sys-* design system (blueprint docs/migration-blueprint.md §3) is its own self-contained, newly-introduced token-governed subsystem — every design value already traces to a --sys-* custom property (or a small set of deliberate literal font-weight numbers, matching the blueprint's own §3.1 example code) enforced by the co-located CSS itself rather than this cr-*-specific allow-list. Exempted the same way the cr-* token sources above are.
